{{Quote|The Imperial Colonization Board regrets to announce that the Kammia colony, Drynn system, has succumbed to a mysterious virus. At this time, there are no reports of survivors.|[[Imperial HoloVision]] news release|<ref name="TABS" />}}
The '''Drynn system''', also known as the '''Kammia system''', was located on the [[Shiritoku Spur]], a [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperroute]] that ran through a portion of [[Wild Space/Legends|Wild Space]]. The [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Kammia]] was part of the system.

{{System-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
The Drynn system was created for ''[[The Truce at Bakura Sourcebook]]'', written by [[Kathy Tyers]] and [[Eric S. Trautmann]], and released in [[February]] [[1996]].
